title: Paper Citations Summary
description: Summary statistics of paper-level citation lookups. Reports coverage, total citations found, and generation metadata.

total_papers.description: Total number of papers in the database.

papers_found.description: Number of papers successfully found in citation databases.

papers_with_errors.description: Number of papers that could not be looked up (errors or not found).

new_queries.description: Number of new papers queried in this run.

total_citations.description: Sum of citation counts across all found papers.

stopped_early.description: Whether the lookup was terminated before completion (e.g. rate limits).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this summary was generated.
